title: Cinna Plushies
description: Adds Cinna + friends as craftable plushies~
body:
currently includes plushies of Cinnamoroll, Mocha, Milk, Espresso, Chiffon, Cappuccino, Azuki and Lloromannic ♡

⁺‧₊˚ ♡ ˚₊‧⁺˖˖⁺‧₊˚ ♡ ˚₊‧⁺˖

**recipes:**


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

cinnamoroll: 4 white wool

mocha: 4 brown wool

milk: 4 white wool

espresso: 4 yellow wool

cappuccino: 4 orange wool

chiffon: 2 orange wool, 2 yellow wool

azuki: 2 pink wool, 2 yellow wool

cherry: 2 black wool, 2 pink wool

berry: 2 yellow wool, 2 black wool

</details>


![a gif of cinnamoroll and friends walking](https://imgur.com/wPRS7oR.png)
